Rezoan Sultan

About Me

From Supply Chain
to AI Research

I'm a Ph.D. researcher in Electrical & Computer Engineering at Morgan State University, building production-ready AI systems with Python and modern ML stacks. My journey began in supply chain analytics and evolved into a deep passion for intelligent, agentic systems.

I specialize in end-to-end AI deployment — from API orchestration and async processing pipelines to monitoring dashboards and UX handoff. I work across the full stack: vector databases, LLM tooling, computer vision, and real-time sensor systems.

Selected as an NSF Research Trainee in 2026, I bring both academic rigor and a builder's mindset to every project I take on.

LinkedIn GitHub
🤖
Agentic LLM Systems
Planner/executor architectures with tool use, RAG, ChromaDB, and HFRL. Human-in-the-loop evals and telemetry for production reliability.
🗄️
Databases & Vector Storage
Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime) across production AI apps. ChromaDB for semantic vector search in RAG pipelines. SQL/MySQL for structured data.
👁️
Computer Vision Pipelines
OpenCV, YOLO, DeepSORT for real-time traffic analysis. Batched async processing with ChromaDB-powered event retrieval.
🔐
AI Cybersecurity Research
Built a unified IDS + phishing detection pipeline achieving 99.95% accuracy and 0.881 ROC-AUC. Expertise in flow-level feature engineering, adversarial ML threat modeling, and heuristic-vs-ML comparative evaluation frameworks.
🌍
Multilingual & Bengali AI
Building one of the first structured benchmarks for code-mixed Bengali instruction-following in LLMs using HuggingFace Transformers and LoRA adaptation.

↗ Live App
07
BCIB: Benchmarking Code-Mixed Bengali Instruction Following in LLMs
Research · In Development
Building one of the first structured benchmarks for evaluating code-mixed Bengali instruction-following in LLMs. This project aims to standardize evaluation for real-world Bangla usage and lay the foundation for scalable Bengali AI infrastructure — addressing a critical gap in low-resource South Asian language modeling.
Low-Resource NLP · Bengali AI · LLM Evaluation · LoRA Adaptation (Planned)
HuggingFace TransformersHuggingFace DatasetsPythonNumPy / PandasOpenAI APISentence TransformersPrompt EngineeringLoRA / QLoRAFAISS / ChromaDB
⏳ In Development GitHub Coming Soon
